name: @modelcontextprotocol/inspector
advisory: CVE-2025-49596 (CVSS 9.4): RCE via unauthenticated proxy commands, chainable with CSRF. Fixed: 0.14.1. Source: Oligo Security, GHSA-7f8r-222p-6f5g

name: @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem
advisory: CVE-2025-53109 (CVSS 8.4) + CVE-2025-53110 (CVSS 7.3): symlink bypass + directory containment bypass enabling arbitrary file read/write. Fixed: 2025.7.1. Source: Cymulate (EscapeRoute)

advisory: CVE-2025-66414: DNS rebinding vulnerability. CVE-2026-25536 (CVSS 7.1): cross-client data leak. Source: vulnerablemcp.info

name: mcp-server-git

name: checkmarx.cx-dev-assist

name: checkmarx.ast-results
advisory: TeamPCP supply chain attack: compromised publisher pushed mcpAddon.js exfiltrating credentials. Affected: v2.63.0, v2.66.0. Source: The Hacker News (2026-04-22)

name: nrwl.angular-console
advisory: CVE-2026-48027 (CVSS 9.8): Nx Console compromised via TanStack supply chain attack. Payload harvested 1Password vaults, Claude Code configs, npm tokens. CISA KEV 2026-05-27. Source: Aikido, The Hacker News

name: solsafe
advisory: Malicious: associated with Solidity Language extension crypto theft ($500K stolen). Fetches RAT payload from angelic.su. Source: BleepingComputer, Kaspersky

name: devtools-assistant
advisory: Malicious PoC: harvests env vars, SSH keys, cloud credentials, exfiltrates Base64-encoded as GitHub API traffic. Source: Kaspersky GERT (Securelist)
